{{Quote|As you can see from the overlay of our official hyper-space route charts - Treskov is a dead end. But if we add the secret Imperial Core routes that Princess Leia brought back from Bastion... You see that unmarked routes from Treskov lead farther into the Core.|[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]]|<ref name="DW" />}}
The '''Treskov system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]], centered on the star [[Treskov 115-W]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] used it in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Once abandoned, the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] used the system to [[Battle of Ebaq|decimate]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] ranks on [[Ebaq 9]], a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of the system's [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ebaq/Legends|Ebaq]].<ref name="DW" />
